description:
## Goal

Build `propose_edges.py` — Pass C of Stage 3. For each chunk, find top-N most similar chunks from *other traditions* and ask an LLM to classify the relationship.

## File Location

`scripts/propose_edges.py`

## Dependencies

Requires Stage 4 (vector store) to have at least an initial embedding pass complete.

## Responsibilities

1. For each chunk, query the vector store for top-5 nearest neighbours from traditions other than its own.
2. Build a pair-classification prompt (see ticket subtask 3.6.2) showing both chunks and asking for one of: PARALLELS / CONTRASTS / surface_only / unrelated, plus confidence and justification.
3. Write results to `staged_edges` with `tier='proposed'`.
4. Deduplicate: never re-propose a pair already present in `staged_edges` regardless of order (ticket subtask 3.6.3).

## Subtasks (from doc)

- Vector store integration
- LLM pair classification prompt
- Deduplication

## Acceptance Criteria

- Generates ≥ N candidate edges per chunk (where N is the configured top-k after filtering)
- No duplicate (source_chunk, target_chunk) pair classifications
- Output rows carry justification and confidence
- Skips intra-tradition pairs

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Depends on Stage 4 vector store (embed_corpus.py). Building with abstract VectorStore interface stubbed; will be wired to real Chroma/FAISS in Stage 4. Script is complete and runnable once embed_corpus.py has populated the store.

resolution.note: scripts/propose_edges.py: vector store interface (Stage4 stub), top-N cross-tradition neighbour query, LLM pair classification (PARALLELS/CONTRASTS/surface_only/unrelated), staged_edges deduplication. Wired to vector_store.py when Stage 4 completes.
